string 2:
Ow... I think I must've broken something.
I can barely move.

BLIMPMON IS IN SERIOUS CONDITION.
CAUSE OF DAMAGE: ARTILLERY FIRE.
It must have been from back then...
Are they all right?
{next}I brought the material for the repairs!
{next}It must have been from back then...
{next}Are they all right?

DURING THE CHAOTIC BATTLE, OUR DEFENSE
SYSTEMS WERE TAKEN OVER BY THE TITANS.

THE SITUATION IS NOW UNDER CONTROL, BUT WE REQUIRE
A LARGE AMOUNT OF METAL TO FIX THE DAMAGE.

THERE IS NO IMMEDIATE THREAT TO THEIR LIFE,
BUT THE DAMAGE IS WIDESPREAD.

REPAIRS REQUIRE A LARGE AMOUNT OF METAL FROM THE
MINES WHICH HAVE RECENTLY BECOME ACCESSIBLE AGAIN.

THE NECESSARY METALS HAVE BEEN SECURED.
COMMENCING REPAIRS ON BLIMPMON...

THE REPAIRS ARE COMPLETE. BLIMPMON HAS
BEEN RESTORED TO THEIR PRIOR STATE.
I SHALL BE GOING NOW.

Hey, ya! Take a look at me! Pretty cool, eh?
I'm ready to fly across the skies again!

Ya helped me get all fixed up? Thanks!
Here. This is for all yer help!

So, where to? I can go anywhere! For now, though,
I'm heading back to Central Town!

The shops in Central Town switched up their product
lineups! You should go check 'em out!

Blimpmon's been repaired and we've got some new products in,
so feel free to take a look.

New items added! ♪ We've got an all-new product lineup for
you! ♪

Gehe. Thanks to Blimpmon bein' up and runnin' again, the
shop's got some new inventory in.
